references.hebrew: וַיִּשְׁלַ֗ח אֶֽת־נַעֲרֵי֙ בְּנֵ֣י יִשְׂרָאֵ֔ל וַֽיַּעֲל֖וּ עֹלֹ֑ת וַֽיִּזְבְּח֞וּ זְבָחִ֧ים שְׁלָמִ֛ים לַיהֹוָ֖ה פָּרִֽים׃
references.english: He designated some assistantsaassistants Or “young men.” among the Israelites, and they offered burnt offerings and sacrificed bulls as offerings of well-being to GOD.

commentary_links.hebrew: וַיִּשְׁלַ֗ח אֶֽת־נַעֲרֵי֙ בְּנֵ֣י יִשְׂרָאֵ֔ל וַֽיַּעֲל֖וּ עֹלֹ֑ת וַֽיִּזְבְּח֞וּ זְבָחִ֧ים שְׁלָמִ֛ים לַיהֹוָ֖ה פָּרִֽים׃
commentary_links.english: He designated some assistantsaassistants Or “young men.” among the Israelites, and they offered burnt offerings and sacrificed bulls as offerings of well-being to GOD.
commentary_links.matched_snippet: הדיבור דכתיב ויזבחו זבחים שלמים ראייה

commentary_links.hebrew: וְחַנָּ֖ה לֹ֣א עָלָ֑תָה כִּֽי־אָמְרָ֣ה לְאִישָׁ֗הּ עַ֣ד יִגָּמֵ֤ל הַנַּ֙עַר֙ וַהֲבִאֹתִ֗יו וְנִרְאָה֙ אֶת־פְּנֵ֣י יְהֹוָ֔ה וְיָ֥שַׁב שָׁ֖ם עַד־עוֹלָֽם׃
commentary_links.english: Hannah did not go up. She said to her husband, “When the child is weaned, I will bring him. For when he has appeared before G<small>OD</small>, he must remain there for good.”
commentary_links.matched_snippet: וחנה לא עלתה כי אמרה לאישה עד יגמל
